response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep JVM or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse languages including Java and DLang
Proven track record in building developer tooling and open-source projects
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent professional work on Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or Spring ecosystem
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not JVM-focused
Lacks demonstrable experience with IDE internals, build tool integration, or application server tooling
